umidi
  • API Reference
  • Template Class FirmwareUpdateSession
  • View page source

Template Class FirmwareUpdateSession

  • Defined in File umi_session.hh

Class Documentation

template<uint8_t WindowSize = 4>
class FirmwareUpdateSession

Complete firmware update session controller Combines timeout management and flow control.

Public Functions

inline void init(const TimeoutConfig &timeout_config, const FlowConfig &flow_config) noexcept

Initialize with configurations.

inline void start(uint32_t current_time, uint32_t total_size) noexcept

Start new session.

Parameters:

  • current_time – Current timestamp (ms)

  • total_size – Expected total firmware size

inline void end() noexcept

End session (success or failure)

inline bool receive_data(uint8_t seq, size_t data_len, uint32_t current_time) noexcept

Process incoming data packet.

Parameters:

  • seq – Sequence number

  • data_len – Data length

  • current_time – Current timestamp

Returns:

true if packet accepted

inline uint8_t get_ack() const noexcept

Get ACK to send.

inline void record_ack_sent(uint32_t current_time) noexcept

Record that we sent an ACK.

inline void record_ack_received() noexcept

Record that we received an ACK.

inline TimeoutEvent check_timeout(uint32_t current_time) const noexcept

Check for timeouts.

Parameters:

current_time – Current timestamp

Returns:

Timeout event if any

inline bool handle_timeout(TimeoutEvent event) noexcept

Handle timeout event.

Parameters:

event – Timeout event

Returns:

true if session should continue, false if should abort

inline SessionState state() const noexcept

Get session state.

inline float progress() const noexcept

Get progress (0.0 - 1.0)

inline uint32_t received_bytes() const noexcept

Get received bytes.

inline uint32_t total_bytes() const noexcept

Get total bytes expected.

inline bool is_complete() const noexcept

Check if transfer complete.

inline FlowControlSender<WindowSize> &sender() noexcept

Access sender (for host-side use)

inline FlowControlReceiver &receiver() noexcept

Access receiver (for device-side use)

inline SessionTimer &timer() noexcept

Access timer.
